title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
